tv.generator-info-name: WebGrab+Plus/w MDB & REX Postprocess -- version V3.3.0.0 -- Jan van Straaten

programme.title: All I Didn't Want For Christmas (new)
programme.desc: Emily Harris isn't doing great. In a desperate bid to improve her life and make this Christmas not totally suck, Emily drunkenly writes a letter to Santa. Fortunately, and unfortunately, her wine-soaked wishes start coming true. P.S. she definitely does not remember most of what she wished for in the letter, so she's in for some uncomfortable surprises. Which eventually lead to some Christmas-fueled soul searching about what she actually wants/needs. (new).(n)

programme.title: Last Holiday
programme.desc: Romantic comedy about a shy American saleswoman whose doctor misdiagnoses her. When she believes that death is calling, she decides to go out with a bang and heads to Europe for an extended stay at a swanky resort. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Shawn (Shawn Wayans) fears that Marlon's new girlfriend is a lot more experienced than she lets on. Marlon: Marlon Wayans. Angel: Angelle Brooks. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Pops' old girlfriend has Shawn and Marlon worried. Pops: John Witherspoon. Susan: Chip Fields-Hurd. Shawn: Shawn Wayans. Marlon: Marlon Wayans. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon tapes Shawn and Dee in bed together and sends it to "America's Video Bloopers." Missy Elliott appears as herself. Shawn Wayans, Marlon Wayans, Anna Maria Horsford. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Shawn (Shawn Wayans) has to weed out the truth about Marlon's involvement with a drug-using actor. Marlon: Marlon Wayans. Pops: John Witherspoon. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon (Marlon Wayans) is held hostage by a fan, and Shawn gets himself captured as well when he attempts a rescue. Shawn: Shawn Wayans. Pops: John Witherspoon. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon (Marlon Wayans) joins a cult, thinking he's enrolled in an acting seminar. Mrs. Bliss: Kelly Coffield. Shawn: Shawn Wayans. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon, Shawn and Pops discover the true meaning of giving when cousin Sheila (Kim Wayans) invites them to her farm for Christmas. Marlon: Marlon Wayans. Shawn: Shawn Wayans. Pops: John Witherspoon. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin lets his job as the producer of the station's variety show go to his head. Keylolo: Yo-Yo. Evelyn: LaWanda Page. Tap Dancer: Travis Payne. Pam: Tichina Arnold. Stan: Garrett Morris. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin and Gina try to expose Rev. Love (David Alan Grier) as a fraud after he cons Martin's mother. Sister Rubella: Jeri Gray. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Cole: Carl Anthony Payne II. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Everyone tells their own version of how Martin and Gina met. Charles: Mirron Willis. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Pam: Tichina Arnold. Bouncer No. 1: Shashawne Hall. Cole: Carl Anthony Payne II. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin is determined to win the "Man of the Decade" award at his high school reunion. Ricky Fontaine: Miguel A. Nunez Jr. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Vanessa: Wendy Robinson. Keisha: Lynette Lane. Tommy: Thomas Mikal Ford. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: When the cat (Gina) is away, the mice (Martin, Tommy and Cole) try to play---and so does the cat. Seymour Butts: Cameron W. Jones. Raul: Luis Antonio Ramos. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Pam: Tichina Arnold. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin has the gang over to watch boxing, but it's Cole's new relationship that's on the ropes when his girlfriend (Bridgid Coulter) desires Tommy. Martin Lawrence. Tommy: Thomas Mikal Ford. Brother Man: Reginald Ballard. Stan: Garrett Morris. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin isn't expecting a woman (Ajai Sanders) to go into labor in his apartment. Bobbi: Wendy Davis. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Pam: Tichina Arnold. Sean: Jonathan Gries. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin decides to act macho after Stan convinces him that Gina has been controlling his life. Kimberly: Monica R. Cooper. Robert: Keith Diamond. Gina: Tisha Campbell. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Carlton becomes manager of the Peacock Stop; an "I Hate Hilary" newsletter precipitates stormy weather. Prof. Milligan: Rick Fitts. Chessler: Jay Arlen Jones. Prof. Kemp: Mark Arnott. Hilary: Karyn Parsons. Carlton: Alfonso Ribeiro. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.sub-title: I Know Why the Caged Bird Screams
programme.desc: Will and Jazz steal a statue from a rival school, whose team retaliates by kidnapping ULA's lucky charm---Carlton (Alfonso Ribeiro), the strutting peacock mascot. Coach Kelly: Jeff Doucette. Amanda: Rana Kirkland. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.sub-title: When You Hit upon a Star
programme.desc: Will (Will Smith) is a no-show at his own surprise birthday party and takes off with a celebrity (Stacy Dash) who he thinks has the hots for him. Ian: David Sterry. Rick: Alan Smith. Philip: James Avery. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.sub-title: Stop Will! In the Name of Love
programme.desc: A Valentine's double date finds Will treating Ashley (Tatyana M. Ali) like a kid and Ashley demanding r-e-s-p-e-c-t. Samantha: Amy Hunter. Duane: Branford Marsalis. Will: Will Smith. Carlton: Alfonso Ribeiro. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: A job as a car salesman fattens Will's wallet and prompts him to quit college. Pete: Robert Guillaume. Vy: Vernee Watson-Johnson. Harrison: Mel Johnson Jr. Will: Will Smith. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Philip foots the bill when Jazz (Jeffrey A. Townes) decides to marry a jailbird (Karen Malina White) who moves in on Will. Philip: James Avery. Will: Will Smith. Bridesmaid: Johari Johnson. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Shawn's romantic Valentine's Day plans go awry when his girlfriend (Renee Hughes) wises up to his two-timing ways and spurns him for Marlon. Meanwhile, Dee thinks her secret admirer is Pops (John Witherspoon). (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Pops lands a gig as the Ghetto Gourmet on TV. But with Marlon as his assistant, what's cooking is the show's goose. Meanwhile, street hustler T.C. becomes a security guard. Ken: Gary Beach. Kiki: Heather Lee. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon (Marlon Wayans) takes the credit when Shawn saves a boy's life, and the public adulation goes to his head, which is soon filled with visions of his own line of action figures. Sylvia: Gretchen Palmer. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: When Dee falls for a smooth-talking con man, Shawn and Marlon must find a way to open her eyes before the wedding. Roland: Marc Gomes. Dee: Anna Maria Horsford. Stacey: Roxanne Beckford. Marlon: Marlon Wayans. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton plots a proposal; a libel suit threatens to close down Flavor; the race for Brooklyn alderman heats up with Max on the ticket. Karen: Judith Scott. Mugger: Bobcat Goldthwait. Overton: John Henton. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Conclusion. Synclaire confronts the mugger (Bobcat Goldthwait) who robbed Overton; Russell tries to save Flavor; and Max makes an impassioned campaign announcement. Off. Solis: Patrick Labyorteaux. Russell: Shaun Baker. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah endorses a candidate in Flavor after interviewing Max, whose platform seems riddled with clichés. Perez: Danny Mora. Miriam: Toy Newkirk. Max: Erika Alexander. Khadijah: Queen Latifah. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine goes on the prowl for a new man after Keith ignores her at his art opening. Keith: Khalil Kain. Russell: Shaun Baker. Carvin: Wayne Wilderson. Auntie Liz: Armelia McQueen. Regine: Kim Fields Freeman. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: A financial crisis may force Khadijah to sell her beloved magazine to a faceless corporation. Jeremy: Joseph C. Phillips. Russell: Shaun Baker. Ivan: Bumper Robinson. Khadijah: Queen Latifah. Synclaire: Kim Coles. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Vanessa's parents have a fight and her father (Rasta) needs a place to stay, so he lands on the Kyles. He's an unusual houseguest, to put it mildly. Meanwhile, Franklin (Noah Gray-Cabey) has cracked the lottery. Unfortunately, he must rely on Jr. to buy the ticket that he has calculated will win. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Calvin (Rasta) goes to work at Kyle Trucking---well, not work, exactly, but Michael does feel as though he must hire his future in-law. Meanwhile, Claire has a science paper due on cold fusion, a topic about which she knows little and cares less. So she asks Franklin (Noah Grey-Cabey) for help. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael has plans for a romantic getaway with Jay, but when Jr. foils that, they settle for a romantic evening at home. Hurdle No. 1: getting the kids out of the house. And that turns out to be the easy part. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's so excited about a basketball game he's watching on TV that he accidentally tapes over Kady's first steps. What to do? Reenact them, with the reluctant assistance of Franklin (Noah Gray-Cabey). Stevie: Taylor Negron. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Martin Lawrence is at his wisecracking best as a motormouthed rent-a-cop teamed with a reluctant partner in this action-packed buddy comedy. The mismatched duo stumble across a major smuggling operation overseen by a master criminal, and when they take their suspicions to the police, they learn that dirty cops are on the hood's payroll. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami narcotics officers are forced to switch identities to track down heroin stolen right out of police headquarters. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Martin Lawrence and Will Smith return as odd-couple, wisecracking Miami cops in this action-packed sequel to 1995's "Bad Boys." This time, Burnett (Lawrence) and Lowrey (Smith) try to stop the flow of Ecstasy into the city by taking on a drug bigwig from Cuba. Meanwhile, love blossoms between Lowrey and Burnett's sister---a romance that Lowrey tries to hide from his partner. Jordi Molla. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: When Shawn (Shawn Wayans) decides to marry an immigrant so she can be granted citizenship, the woman must live with him for six months, a move he soon comes to regret. Pops: John Witherspoon. Dee: Anna Maria Horsford. Famali: Jo Nell Kennedy. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Shawn follows in Marlon's footsteps as a big brother to a youngster, but it turns out that his new little charge already has a jail record. Shawn: Shawn Wayans. Marlon: Marlon Wayans. Jimmy: Dwayne Winstead. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon lands an important role in a war movie, but his decision to do research on a military base has disastrous consequences. Pops: John Witherspoon. Scully: Ron O'Neal. Ernie: Walter Olkewicz. Lopez: Willie Barcena. Dee: Anna Maria Horsford. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon help Dee (Anna Maria Horsford), who's in jeopardy of losing her job as a security guard. Pops: John Witherspoon. Shawn: Shawn Wayans. Marlon: Marlon Wayans. Kellogg: Beau Billingslea. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: When Gina throws Martin's basketball tickets away, she has to work for Sheneneh to get replacements. Martin Lawrence. Myra: Bebe Drake. Rhodesia: Kelly Jo Minter. Laquita: Simbi Khali. Gina: Tisha Campbell. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: After giving Gina's male friend (Darryl Alan Reed) the boot, Martin accompanies Gina to a shoe store. Martin Lawrence. Magazine Man: Abdul Salaam El Razzac. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Pam: Tichina Arnold. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin's mother leaves her parrot---which likes to insult Gina---in Martin's care. Salesman: Andy Kindler. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Cole: Carl Anthony Payne II. Pam: Tichina Arnold. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin attends one of Gina's exercise classes and becomes obsessed with pursuing a healthy lifestyle. Instructor: Charnele Brown. Gina: Tisha Campbell. Pam: Tichina Arnold. Sean: Jonathan Gries. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin thinks his job is going nowhere after meeting a TV talk-show host (Tommy Davidson). Part 1 of two. Martin Lawrence. Stan: Garrett Morris. Pam: Tichina Arnold. Tommy: Thomas Mikal Ford. Geri: Jeri Gray. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Conclusion. Martin takes steps to be on Varnel Hill's talk show. Jodeci and Fred Barry appear. Varnel: Tommy Davidson. Michael Jackson: Valentino. Mbutu: Edafe. Model: Jennifer Lee. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin's crazy relatives and Gina's parents arrive for Thanksgiving dinner. Sonny: Reno Wilson. Uncle Junior: John Witherspoon. Mrs. Waters: Judyann Elder. Dr. Waters: J.A. Preston. Gina: Tisha Campbell. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Martin
programme.desc: Martin and Gina (Martin Lawrence, Tisha Campbell) make a bet to abstain from sex for two weeks. Pam: Tichina Arnold. Tommy: Thomas Mikal Ford. Cole: Carl Anthony Payne II. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.sub-title: M Is for the Many Things She Gave Me
programme.desc: An old flame (Pam Grier) visits Philip with her daughter (Elise Neal), then proceeds to put the moves on Will. David: William Thomas Jr. Philip: James Avery. Vivian: Daphne Maxwell Reid. Will: Will Smith. Hilary: Karyn Parsons. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jazz and Jewel try to start a family, but it turns out they're going to need a little help---from Will. Jewel: Karen Malina White. Junior: Tarpon London. Jazz: Jeffrey A. Townes. Nurse: Pat Crawford Brown. Dana: Kenya Moore. Will: Will Smith. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.sub-title: Papa's Got a Brand New Excuse
programme.desc: Ben Vereen plays Will's long-lost father, who breezes into town and promises Will the moon, which angers an unforgiving Philip (James Avery). Vivian: Daphne Maxwell Reid. Hilary: Karyn Parsons. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Will returns to Philly and finds he's the butt of friends' jokes and has a reputation as a chicken. Omar: Jacques Apollo Bolton. Dick Clark: Himself. Chill: Daryl "Chill" Mitchell. Duke: Robert Costanzo. Will: Will Smith. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.desc: Conclusion. Ashley lets stardom go to her head, while Will is cut down to size by a record producer. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air
programme.sub-title: What's Will Got to Do with It?
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Philip and Will don't see eye to eye on Ashley's singing career, but record producer Gordy Berry is all ears. Quincy Jones and Little Richard make cameo appearances. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: The building owner's wife comes on to Shawn, who's interested only in renewing his lease. How interested? she wants to know. Mrs. Neidermeyer: Adrienne Barbeau. Mr. Neidermeyer: Pat Harrington. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon catches the acting bug and neglects the newsstand, angering Shawn, who thinks he's acting like a fool. Stacey: Roxanne Beckford. Lovejoy: Faizon Love. T.C.: Phill Lewis. Pops: John Witherspoon. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Marlon breaks his leg by slipping on Shawn's spilled coffee just before a dance contest, and his frustration spills over into a lawsuit that brings disorder to the court. Judge: Lillian Lehman. T.C.: Phill Lewis. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Wayans Bros.
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon let Grandma move in, then plot to drive her out after she cramps their bachelor lifestyle. The problem: she won't take a hint. Grandma: Ja'Net Du Bois. Dionne Warwick has a cameo. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine is the lone juror holding up the verdict in a controversial case. Judge: Victor Raider-Wexler. Patrick: Andrew Craig. Regine: Kim Fields Freeman. Juanita: Anne Betancourt. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: A marriage-compatibility test may reveal flaws in Synclaire and Overton's relationship. Rev. Taylor: Dorien Wilson. Mrs. Taylor: Arnetia Walker. Tim: Billy "Sly" Williams. Max: Erika Alexander. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: I've Got You Under My Skin
programme.desc: Khadijah fears that the doctor she's dating (Isaiah Washington) may not have seen her best side; Regine aids a sinister couple with wedding plans. Damiana: Susan Beaubian. Edwin: Brad Greenquist. Ivan: Bumper Robinson. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: At the guys' alumni gala, Kyle settles an old score with the school bully (Tone Loc) and Synclaire impersonates Overton's former classmate. Sharon: Elise Neal. Reed: John F. O'Donohue. Carl: Andrew Shaifer. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: Do You Take this Man's Wallet
programme.desc: Wedding planner Regine learns a secret about her pal Darryl's bride-to-be (Vivica A. Fox). Darryl: Heavy D. Ray: Jack Carter. Regine: Kim Fields Freeman. Overton: John Henton. Reverend: Veronica Redd Forrest. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max's romantic new suitor is holding out for the right woman---Max. Bengals quarterback Jeff Blake has a cameo. Charles: Isaiah Washington. Max: Erika Alexander. Kyle: T.C. Carson. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami narcotics officers are forced to switch identities to track down heroin stolen right out of police headquarters. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Martin Lawrence and Will Smith return as odd-couple, wisecracking Miami cops in this action-packed sequel to 1995's "Bad Boys." This time, Burnett (Lawrence) and Lowrey (Smith) try to stop the flow of Ecstasy into the city by taking on a drug bigwig from Cuba. Meanwhile, love blossoms between Lowrey and Burnett's sister---a romance that Lowrey tries to hide from his partner. Jordi Molla. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: El zoom
programme.desc: Qué nos pretenden enseñar las fotos del actual escenario internacional? ¿Están retocadas, trucadas o desenfocadas? ¿Qué imagen nos quieren mostrar? 'El Zoom' nos acerca hasta el más mínimo detalle de los procesos geopolíticos y económicos, nos aporta un enfoque diferente de los acontecimientos de escala mundial y retrata la actualidad desde todos los ángulos.(n)

programme.title: Juventud de Donbass: Hoy como ayer-I
programme.desc: Hoy como ayer, la muerte es a veces el precio a pagar por la defensa de la patria.(n)

programme.title: Juventud de Donbass: Hoy como ayer-I
programme.desc: Hoy como ayer, la muerte es a veces el precio a pagar por la defensa de la patria.(n)

programme.title: Juventud de Donbass: Hoy como ayer-I
programme.desc: Hoy como ayer, la muerte es a veces el precio a pagar por la defensa de la patria.(n)

programme.desc: Hoy como ayer, la muerte es a veces el precio a pagar por la defensa de la patria.(n)

programme.title: Focas en Sajalín: entre la vida y la muerte
programme.desc: Película documental.(n)

programme.title: Contrapunto
programme.desc: Cristina Martín y Pablo Mura tratarán de profundizar y encontrar respuestas a temas de actualidad.(n)

programme.title: Rusofobia: una historia de odio
programme.desc: La rusofobia que se ha adueñado de Occidente no es de anteayer.(n)

programme.title: Rusofobia: Una historia de odio - Parte II
programme.desc: Un documental que explora las repercusiones de la rusofobia, una práctica que se extiende.(n)

programme.title: Contrapunto
programme.desc: Cristina Martín y Pablo Mura tratarán de profundizar y encontrar respuestas a temas de actualidad.(n)

programme.desc: Un documental que explora las repercusiones de la rusofobia, una práctica que se extiende.(n)

programme.title: Contrapunto
programme.desc: Cristina Martín y Pablo Mura tratarán de profundizar y encontrar respuestas a temas de actualidad.(n)

programme.title: Rusofobia: una historia de odio
programme.desc: La rusofobia que se ha adueñado de Occidente no es de anteayer.(n)

programme.title: Rusofobia: Una historia de odio - Parte II
programme.desc: Un documental que explora las repercusiones de la rusofobia, una práctica que se extiende.(n)

programme.desc: Cristina Martín y Pablo Mura tratarán de profundizar y encontrar respuestas a temas de actualidad.(n)

programme.title: La India: niños desaparecidos
programme.desc: Decenas de miles de menores de edad desaparecen cada año en la India. Es tal el número de desaparecidos que para UNICEF la situación puede equipararse a un genocidio. Muchos de esos niños son víctimas de trata y sometidos a explotación sexual y...(n)

programme.title: El zoom
programme.desc: Qué nos pretenden enseñar las fotos del actual escenario internacional? ¿Están retocadas, trucadas o desenfocadas? ¿Qué imagen nos quieren mostrar? 'El Zoom' nos acerca hasta el más mínimo detalle de los procesos geopolíticos y económicos, nos aporta un enfoque diferente de los acontecimientos de escala mundial y retrata la actualidad desde todos los ángulos.(n)

programme.title: La lista de Erick
programme.sub-title: Islas Kuriles: donde nace el sol

programme.title: Libia: cayucos a precio de crucero
programme.desc: Para los migrantes africanos casi todos los caminos conducen a Libia,.(n)

programme.title: La India: niños desaparecidos
programme.desc: Decenas de miles de menores de edad desaparecen cada año en la India. Es tal el número de desaparecidos que para UNICEF la situación puede equipararse a un genocidio. Muchos de esos niños son víctimas de trata y sometidos a explotación sexual y...(n)

programme.title: La lista de Erick
programme.sub-title: Islas Kuriles: donde nace el sol

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A desperate father takes matters into his own hands in the case against his daughter's rapist. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An actress accuses a high-powered media mogul of attempted rape. Benson finds herself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse. Meanwhile, changes in the squadroom put Carisi between a rock and a hard place. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU struggles to find a serial predator who uses a date rape drug that leaves no evidence behind. Rollins receives some good news. Guest starring Natalie Smith, Eddie Kay Thomas, Daniel London and Madison Ferris. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson teams up with Lt. Barek and the Bronx SVU to track down a serial rapist with victims in both boroughs. Guest starring Annabella Sciorra and Rudy Mungaray. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.sub-title: In The Year We All Fell Down
programme.desc: Benson walks into a hostage situation at a neighborhood restaurant; and Rollins tries to help her father after being hospitalized. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Barmageddon
programme.desc: Country superstars Blake Shelton and Kane Brown realize everybody "Sharts.". (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl vanishes after following her big sister to a college party, and her abductor covers his tracks online by using his impressive computer skills. Meanwhile, Rollins gets sidetracked from the case by an unexpected visit from her own sister. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: In Part 1 of the two-part 17th-season opener, the squad revisit a crime scene where bodies were buried by a serial killer. Rollins tries to get a confession, but the killer reveals shocking new info instead. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A violinist is raped by her colleague, who doesn't remember committing the crime, and the investigation leads police to Rollins' sister. Meanwhile, Rollins' mother throws a baby shower for her; and Sgt. Mike Dodds reports to work at the SVU squad. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A famous actor is arrested for rape, but then the charges are dropped due to lack of evidence. However, Rollins isn't satisfied with that and takes matters into her own hands. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Callen, Sam, Kensi and Deeks spend Christmas aboard an aircraft carrier investigating the death of a fellow NCIS special agent. Back at headquarters, Nell and Eric enjoy the holiday; and Hetty takes a trip. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony's dad's a murder suspect when he's found in a car with a body and no memory of his actions. Tony is taken off the case, forcing him to disobey orders to prove his dad's innocence. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who's seven months pregnant is found assaulted, with her fetus removed. Dr. Richard Manning: John Ritter. Kyle Novacek: Bobby Cannavale. Nicole Manning: Tricia Paoluccio. Erin Sena: Marianne Hagan. Dr. George Huang: B.D. Wong. Munch: Richard Belzer. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Henry Winkler plays a restaurateur whose wife is assaulted during a robbery at their plush Manhattan residence. Jessica Blaine-Todd: Mary Beth Hurt. Curtis Johansen: Roy Thinnes. Denise Johansen: Sherri Parker Lee. Judge Petrovsky: Joanna Merlin. Lou Parks: Louis Mustillo. Daniel Ryan: Alex Feldman. Cabot: Stephanie March. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Shootings at a video-rental store lead to a case involving an adopted daughter (Ari Graynor), a sexually abused child, a lawyer's son (Christopher Denham) and a client's immunity. Malcolm Field: Michael Gaston. Roger Kressler: Ned Eisenberg. Peter Kurtz: Dan Lauria. Raquel Kurtz: Glynnis O'Connor. Cragen: Dann Florek. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler is sent to Prague to look for a missing teen (Alexis Dziena) whose pictures are showing up on child-porn Web sites. Claudia Williams: Pam Grier. Kate Logan: Dagmara Dominczyk. Sam Bishop: Billy McNamara. Erich Tassig: Lothaire Bluteau. Nick Taylor: Stephen Gevedon. Cragen: Dann Florek. Munch: Richard Belzer. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A former victim of Tibetan political torture is found murdered, with one of her feet missing. Mrs. Krug: Margaret Colin. Gina Bernardo: Illeana Douglas. Preston Bennett: Frederick Weller. Munch: Richard Belzer. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The investigation of an apparent suicide leads to a case involving members of a wealthy family. Candace Lamerly: Michael Learned. Drew Lamerly: Erik von Detten. Douglas Lamerly: John Bolger. Tom Paysen:John Ottavino. Lorna Scarry: Mariette Hartley. Jenny Rochester: Sarah Wayne Callies. Cabot: Stephanie March. Benson: Mariska Hagitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman in a tenement is raped and murdered in front of her 6-year-old son. Not surprisingly, the boy is too traumatized to answer questions. And one of them turns out to be: what were they doing in that apartment in the first place? They weren't poor, but they were on the run. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Multiple murders at a Manhattan townhouse are the start of a killing spree. Al Baker: Frank Langella. Det. Deuthorn: Erik Palladino. Charlie Baker: Ian Somerhalder. Billy Baker: Jason Ritter. Cragen: Dann Florek. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a woman (Katherine Moennig) fights off an attacker, what seems to be a case of self-defense murder grows more complicated following a blood test. Eddie: Chad Lindberg. Morty Berger: Michael Lerner. Lisette: Lindsay Kraft. Cabot: Stephanie March. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a waitress is found shot outside the club where she worked, her father (Joe Morton) seeks vengeance. Donna Emmett: Viola Davis. Perry Williams: Paul Leyden. Donovan Alvarez: D.J. Cotrona. Kimmie: Michelle Hicks. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A teen's murder leads to a case involving runaways and a doctor (Gale Harold) interested in human cloning. Paula Haggerty: Barbara Barrie. Jessica Morse: Kimberly J. Brown. Attorney Quentin: Laura Elena Harring. Judge Petrovsky: Joanna Merlin. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The search is on for an abducted woman who's about to give birth. Rose Granville: Shirley Knight. Melinda Granville: Kellie Martin. Daniel Lester: Gabriel Olds. Laura Bergeron: Marisa Ryan. Annika Bergeron: Karen Goberman. Sam Marlett: Clarke Thorell. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: A tough, demanding businesswoman discovers that she's about to be deported back to Canada, forcing her to rush into a marriage of convenience with her young assistant in this hilarious and endearing romantic comedy. But the ruse becomes even more complicated when the two must visit his family in Alaska while posing as a couple.(n)

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: A hugely successful businesswoman is convicted of insider trading and sentenced to prison in this uproarious comedy. After being released, she tries to earn redemption by helping a group of young girls in their quest to sell brownies. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Vince Vaughn stars in this raucous romantic comedy about a couple attempting to salvage their marriage by inviting three other couples to join them at an island resort. However, everyone is disturbed to discover that participation in therapy sessions is mandatory if they hope to remain at the idyllic paradise. Directed by Peter Billingsley. Jon Favreau, Jason Bateman, Faizon Love, Kristen Bell, Jean Reno. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who's seven months pregnant is found assaulted, with her fetus removed. Dr. Richard Manning: John Ritter. Kyle Novacek: Bobby Cannavale. Nicole Manning: Tricia Paoluccio. Erin Sena: Marianne Hagan. Dr. George Huang: B.D. Wong. Munch: Richard Belzer. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Henry Winkler plays a restaurateur whose wife is assaulted during a robbery at their plush Manhattan residence. Jessica Blaine-Todd: Mary Beth Hurt. Curtis Johansen: Roy Thinnes. Denise Johansen: Sherri Parker Lee. Judge Petrovsky: Joanna Merlin. Lou Parks: Louis Mustillo. Daniel Ryan: Alex Feldman. Cabot: Stephanie March. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Shootings at a video-rental store lead to a case involving an adopted daughter (Ari Graynor), a sexually abused child, a lawyer's son (Christopher Denham) and a client's immunity. Malcolm Field: Michael Gaston. Roger Kressler: Ned Eisenberg. Peter Kurtz: Dan Lauria. Raquel Kurtz: Glynnis O'Connor. Cragen: Dann Florek. Benson: Mariska Hargitay. Stabler: Christopher Meloni. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A burglary occurs at a cyber-security company, but Callen is forced to steer clear of the investigation when Hetty tells him that his girlfriend, Joelle, is one of the lead witnesses. Meanwhile, the team discuss their personal holiday travel plans. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A navy commander's murder is investigated, and in the process, the team runs into E.J. Barrett. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman for hire; and Gang Intelligence reinvestigates the original case. Meanwhile, Ruzek is placed on patrol duty after returning from his undercover assignment. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The team hunts the arsonist responsible for the massive fire that left Olinsky's daughter in critical condition. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container. The bizarre scenario leaves Voight questioning the legitimacy of the case, and sends the team on a twisted trail to get to the bottom of it. Meanwhile, a former relationship of Halstead's comes back into the picture, much to the surprise of Lindsay. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When a "night crawler" is murdered over a piece of mysterious footage, Intelligence investigates one of Chicago's wealthiest families and uncovers a lineage of old money and secrets. Meanwhile, Burgess's sister Nicole arrives at the District for a visit, and presents an icy attitude towards Ruzek,. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to make finding Nicole their main priority. The case kicks into high gear when she is found clinging to life in an El station. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection with the murder weapon linking it to a case that he worked on 17 years ago. While the victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide, Voight digs back into the old case under the watchful eye of his former partner, Lt. Denny Woods. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When the team is called to an in-progress bank robbery, they come across a Robbery-Homicide detective trying to take over the crime scene; and, as the robberies continue, Lindsay makes a decision that unveils a surprising suspect behind the mask. While working on the case at the district, Upton is shocked to come across Platt, who has a special connection to her past. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: A hugely successful businesswoman is convicted of insider trading and sentenced to prison in this uproarious comedy. After being released, she tries to earn redemption by helping a group of young girls in their quest to sell brownies. (repeat).(n)

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: A tough, demanding businesswoman discovers that she's about to be deported back to Canada, forcing her to rush into a marriage of convenience with her young assistant in this hilarious and endearing romantic comedy. But the ruse becomes even more complicated when the two must visit his family in Alaska while posing as a couple.(n)
